Off Calendar May-13-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Davic J. Cook, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Trimark ERF, Inc. a Delaware corporation.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Cyan Restaurant LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Cyan and dba Cyan Restaurant and dba Lot 7; Hany Mahmoud Desouky, individually and dba Cyan and dba Cyan Restaurant and dba Lot 7;

Dennis Kay sworn and exaimed on behalf of Plaintiff.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1. Credit Application Id/Evid.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 2. Open Invoices Account #33305. Id/Evid.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 3. Group of Invoices Id/Evid.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 4. Group of Statements of Account Id/Evid.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant:
Principal $8,595.36
Pre-Judgment Interest as requested.
Attorney's Fees pursuant to Court's schedule.
Costs per Memorandum of Costs.
Court ordered Exhibits returned to Plaintiff's counsel.
Counsel for Plaintiff to submit a Judgment for the court's signature.
